title: prangos pabularia
intro: Prangos pabularia, also known as Ferula pabularia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Prangos pabularia include reducing pain and inflammation, treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and aiding in digestion, among others. Prangos pabularia is used in various herbal preparations, including essential oils, extracts, and teas, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
